title: Ember Power Sector Emissions Monthly API
description:
Get power sector emissions data at a monthly grain.
    e.g.

`https://api.ember-energy.org/v1/power-sector-emissions/monthly?series=Fossil&start_date=2020-01&api_key=MY_API_KEY`
    

The methodology of this dataset can be found on its [dataset page](https://ember-energy.org/data/monthly-electricity-data/)
    within the 'Methodology - Ember Electricity Data' pdf.
